    <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"DiscussionForumPosting","headline":"[Bug]: Prompt Caching and Reasoning broken for the most price efficient models including Xiaomi Mimo, Minimax 2.1 and GLM","articleBody":"### Check for existing issues\n\n- [x] I have searched the existing issues and checked that my issue is not a duplicate.\n\n### What happened?\n\n## What is this?\n- [x] Feature Request\n- [x] Bug Report\n\n## Summary\nPrompt caching (`cache_control`) and thinking/reasoning parameters are not properly supported for MiniMax, GLM/ZAI, and Xiaomi models - both when using direct providers and through OpenRouter.\n\n## Current Behavior\n\n### 1. `cache_control` is stripped for all three providers\n**Root cause**: All three providers extend `OpenAIGPTConfig`, which calls `remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools()` in `transform_request()`:\n\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:431\nmessages, tools = self.remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(\n    model=model, messages=messages, tools=optional_params.get(\"tools\", [])\n)\n```\n**Affected files:**\n- `litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py` - `MinimaxChatConfig` extends `OpenAIGPTConfig`\n- `litellm/llms/zai/chat/transformation.py` - `ZAIChatConfig` extends `OpenAIGPTConfig`\n- `litellm/llms/openai_like/` - Xiaomi uses generic openai_like provider\n\n### 2. OpenRouter also strips cache_control for these models\n**Root cause**: `CacheControlSupportedModels` only includes Claude and Gemini:\n\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openrouter/chat/transformation.py:25\nclass CacheControlSupportedModels(str, Enum):\n    CLAUDE = \"claude\"\n    GEMINI = \"gemini\"\n    # Missing: minimax, glm, zai\n```\n\n### 3. thinking parameter not supported\n\n| Provider | Direct | OpenRouter |\n|----------|--------|------------|\n| MiniMax | ❌ Not in `get_supported_openai_params()` | ❌ Dropped |\n| GLM/ZAI | ✅ Dynamic (glm-4.7 only) | ❌ Only reasoning_effort added |\n| Xiaomi | ❌ No dedicated provider | N/A |\n\n### 4. Missing model metadata\n- **MiniMax**: `supports_prompt_caching: true` exists but `supports_reasoning` is missing\n- **GLM**: Only `glm-4.7` has `supports_reasoning: true` and cache costs\n- **Xiaomi**: No `supports_prompt_caching` or `supports_reasoning` flags\n\n## Expected Behavior\n- `cache_control` should be passed through to MiniMax, GLM, and Xiaomi APIs\n- `thinking` parameter should be supported for models that support reasoning\n- OpenRouter should preserve `cache_control` for these providers\n- Model metadata should accurately reflect provider capabilities\n\n## Proposed Changes\n\n### 1. MiniMax - Override cache_control stripping\n```python\n# litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py\nclass MinimaxChatConfig(OpenAIGPTConfig):\n    def remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(self, model, messages, tools=None):\n        # MiniMax supports cache_control - don't strip it\n        return messages, tools\n    \n    def get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -\u003e list:\n        base_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)\n        if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider=\"minimax\"):\n            base_params.append(\"thinking\")\n        return base_params + [\"reasoning_split\"]\n```\n\n### 2. GLM/ZAI - Override cache_control stripping\n```python\n# litellm/llms/zai/chat/transformation.py\nclass ZAIChatConfig(OpenAIGPTConfig):\n    def remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(self, model, messages, tools=None):\n        # GLM supports cache_control - don't strip it\n        return messages, tools\n```\n\n### 3. OpenRouter - Add to CacheControlSupportedModels\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openrouter/chat/transformation.py\nclass CacheControlSupportedModels(str, Enum):\n    CLAUDE = \"claude\"\n    GEMINI = \"gemini\"\n    MINIMAX = \"minimax\"  # NEW\n    GLM = \"glm\"          # NEW\n    ZAI = \"z-ai\"         # NEW\n\ndef get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -\u003e list:\n    supported_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)\n    if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider=\"openrouter\") \\\n       or litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model):\n        supported_params.append(\"reasoning_effort\")\n        supported_params.append(\"thinking\")  # ADD THIS\n    return list(dict.fromkeys(supported_params))\n```\n\n### 4. Model metadata updates\n```json\n// model_prices_and_context_window.json\n\"minimax/MiniMax-M2.1\": {\n    \"supports_prompt_caching\": true,\n    \"supports_reasoning\": true,\n    ...\n},\n\"zai/glm-4.6\": {\n    \"supports_reasoning\": true,\n    \"supports_prompt_caching\": true,\n    \"cache_read_input_token_cost\": ...,\n    ...\n}\n```\n\n## Environment\n- LiteLLM version: latest main\n- Models affected:\n  - `minimax/MiniMax-M2.1`\n  - `zai/glm-4.7`, `zai/glm-4.6`\n  - `xiaomi_mimo/mimo-v2-flash`\n  - `openrouter/minimax/*`\n  - `openrouter/z-ai/*`\n\n## Additional Context\nProvider documentation confirming feature support:\n- MiniMax: Supports explicit prompt caching with `cache_control` blocks\n- GLM/Zhipu: Supports automatic caching (cache reads are discounted)\n- Both support thinking/reasoning modes\n\n### Related\n- Prompt caching docs: https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/completion/prompt_caching\n- MiniMax API docs: https://platform.minimax.chat/\n- GLM/Zhipu API docs: https://docs.z.ai/\n\n---\n```\n\n### Steps to Reproduce\n\n1. \n2. \n3. \n\n\n### Relevant log output\n\n```shell\n\n```\n\n### What part of LiteLLM is this about?\n\nProxy\n\n### What LiteLLM version are you on ?\n\nv1.81.0-stable\n\n### Twitter / LinkedIn details\n\n_No response_","author":{"url":"https://github.com/rushilchugh01","@type":"Person","name":"rushilchugh01"},"datePublished":"2026-01-28T11:08:33.000Z","interactionStatistic":{"@type":"InteractionCounter","interactionType":"https://schema.org/CommentAction","userInteractionCount":0},"url":"https://github.com/19923/litellm/issues/19923"}</script>

  <script type="application/json" data-target="react-app.embeddedData">{"payload":{"preloaded_records":{},"structured_data":{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"DiscussionForumPosting","headline":"[Bug]: Prompt Caching and Reasoning broken for the most price efficient models including Xiaomi Mimo, Minimax 2.1 and GLM","articleBody":"### Check for existing issues\n\n- [x] I have searched the existing issues and checked that my issue is not a duplicate.\n\n### What happened?\n\n## What is this?\n- [x] Feature Request\n- [x] Bug Report\n\n## Summary\nPrompt caching (`cache_control`) and thinking/reasoning parameters are not properly supported for MiniMax, GLM/ZAI, and Xiaomi models - both when using direct providers and through OpenRouter.\n\n## Current Behavior\n\n### 1. `cache_control` is stripped for all three providers\n**Root cause**: All three providers extend `OpenAIGPTConfig`, which calls `remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools()` in `transform_request()`:\n\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:431\nmessages, tools = self.remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(\n    model=model, messages=messages, tools=optional_params.get(\"tools\", [])\n)\n```\n**Affected files:**\n- `litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py` - `MinimaxChatConfig` extends `OpenAIGPTConfig`\n- `litellm/llms/zai/chat/transformation.py` - `ZAIChatConfig` extends `OpenAIGPTConfig`\n- `litellm/llms/openai_like/` - Xiaomi uses generic openai_like provider\n\n### 2. OpenRouter also strips cache_control for these models\n**Root cause**: `CacheControlSupportedModels` only includes Claude and Gemini:\n\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openrouter/chat/transformation.py:25\nclass CacheControlSupportedModels(str, Enum):\n    CLAUDE = \"claude\"\n    GEMINI = \"gemini\"\n    # Missing: minimax, glm, zai\n```\n\n### 3. thinking parameter not supported\n\n| Provider | Direct | OpenRouter |\n|----------|--------|------------|\n| MiniMax | ❌ Not in `get_supported_openai_params()` | ❌ Dropped |\n| GLM/ZAI | ✅ Dynamic (glm-4.7 only) | ❌ Only reasoning_effort added |\n| Xiaomi | ❌ No dedicated provider | N/A |\n\n### 4. Missing model metadata\n- **MiniMax**: `supports_prompt_caching: true` exists but `supports_reasoning` is missing\n- **GLM**: Only `glm-4.7` has `supports_reasoning: true` and cache costs\n- **Xiaomi**: No `supports_prompt_caching` or `supports_reasoning` flags\n\n## Expected Behavior\n- `cache_control` should be passed through to MiniMax, GLM, and Xiaomi APIs\n- `thinking` parameter should be supported for models that support reasoning\n- OpenRouter should preserve `cache_control` for these providers\n- Model metadata should accurately reflect provider capabilities\n\n## Proposed Changes\n\n### 1. MiniMax - Override cache_control stripping\n```python\n# litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py\nclass MinimaxChatConfig(OpenAIGPTConfig):\n    def remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(self, model, messages, tools=None):\n        # MiniMax supports cache_control - don't strip it\n        return messages, tools\n    \n    def get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -\u003e list:\n        base_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)\n        if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider=\"minimax\"):\n            base_params.append(\"thinking\")\n        return base_params + [\"reasoning_split\"]\n```\n\n### 2. GLM/ZAI - Override cache_control stripping\n```python\n# litellm/llms/zai/chat/transformation.py\nclass ZAIChatConfig(OpenAIGPTConfig):\n    def remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(self, model, messages, tools=None):\n        # GLM supports cache_control - don't strip it\n        return messages, tools\n```\n\n### 3. OpenRouter - Add to CacheControlSupportedModels\n```python\n# litellm/llms/openrouter/chat/transformation.py\nclass CacheControlSupportedModels(str, Enum):\n    CLAUDE = \"claude\"\n    GEMINI = \"gemini\"\n    MINIMAX = \"minimax\"  # NEW\n    GLM = \"glm\"          # NEW\n    ZAI = \"z-ai\"         # NEW\n\ndef get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -\u003e list:\n    supported_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)\n    if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider=\"openrouter\") \\\n       or litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model):\n        supported_params.append(\"reasoning_effort\")\n        supported_params.append(\"thinking\")  # ADD THIS\n    return list(dict.fromkeys(supported_params))\n```\n\n### 4. Model metadata updates\n```json\n// model_prices_and_context_window.json\n\"minimax/MiniMax-M2.1\": {\n    \"supports_prompt_caching\": true,\n    \"supports_reasoning\": true,\n    ...\n},\n\"zai/glm-4.6\": {\n    \"supports_reasoning\": true,\n    \"supports_prompt_caching\": true,\n    \"cache_read_input_token_cost\": ...,\n    ...\n}\n```\n\n## Environment\n- LiteLLM version: latest main\n- Models affected:\n  - `minimax/MiniMax-M2.1`\n  - `zai/glm-4.7`, `zai/glm-4.6`\n  - `xiaomi_mimo/mimo-v2-flash`\n  - `openrouter/minimax/*`\n  - `openrouter/z-ai/*`\n\n## Additional Context\nProvider documentation confirming feature support:\n- MiniMax: Supports explicit prompt caching with `cache_control` blocks\n- GLM/Zhipu: Supports automatic caching (cache reads are discounted)\n- Both support thinking/reasoning modes\n\n### Related\n- Prompt caching docs: https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/completion/prompt_caching\n- MiniMax API docs: https://platform.minimax.chat/\n- GLM/Zhipu API docs: https://docs.z.ai/\n\n---\n```\n\n### Steps to Reproduce\n\n1. \n2. \n3. \n\n\n### Relevant log output\n\n```shell\n\n```\n\n### What part of <h2 dir="auto">Summary</h2>
<p dir="auto">Prompt caching (<code class="notranslate">cache_control</code>) and thinking/reasoning parameters are not properly supported for MiniMax, GLM/ZAI, and Xiaomi models - both when using direct providers and through OpenRouter.</p>
<h2 dir="auto">Current Behavior</h2>
<h3 dir="auto">1. <code class="notranslate">cache_control</code> is stripped for all three providers</h3>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Root cause</strong>: All three providers extend <code class="notranslate">OpenAIGPTConfig</code>, which calls <code class="notranslate">remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools()</code> in <code class="notranslate">transform_request()</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre class="notranslate"><span class="pl-c"># litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:431</span>
<span class="pl-s1">messages</span>, <span class="pl-s1">tools</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools</span>(
    <span class="pl-s1">model</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">model</span>, <span class="pl-s1">messages</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">messages</span>, <span class="pl-s1">tools</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">optional_params</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s">"tools"</span>, [])
)</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# litellm/llms/openai/chat/gpt_transformation.py:431
messages, tools = self.remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(
    model=model, messages=messages, tools=optional_params.get("tools", [])
)" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Affected files:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code class="notranslate">litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py</code> - <code class="notranslate">MinimaxChatConfig</code> extends <code class="notranslate">OpenAIGPTConfig</code></li>
<li><code class="notranslate">litellm/llms/zai/chat/transformation.py</code> - <code class="notranslate">ZAIChatConfig</code> extends <code class="notranslate">OpenAIGPTConfig</code></li>
<li><code class="notranslate">litellm/llms/openai_like/</code> - Xiaomi uses generic openai_like provider</li>
</ul>

<h3 dir="auto">4. Missing model metadata</h3>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>MiniMax</strong>: <code class="notranslate">supports_prompt_caching: true</code> exists but <code class="notranslate">supports_reasoning</code> is missing</li>
<li><strong>GLM</strong>: Only <code class="notranslate">glm-4.7</code> has <code class="notranslate">supports_reasoning: true</code> and cache costs</li>
<li><strong>Xiaomi</strong>: No <code class="notranslate">supports_prompt_caching</code> or <code class="notranslate">supports_reasoning</code> flags</li>
</ul>
<h2 dir="auto">Expected Behavior</h2>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code class="notranslate">cache_control</code> should be passed through to MiniMax, GLM, and Xiaomi APIs</li>
<li><code class="notranslate">thinking</code> parameter should be supported for models that support reasoning</li>
<li>OpenRouter should preserve <code class="notranslate">cache_control</code> for these providers</li>
<li>Model metadata should accurately reflect provider capabilities</li>
</ul>
<h2 dir="auto">Proposed Changes</h2>
<h3 dir="auto">1. MiniMax - Override cache_control stripping</h3>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre class="notranslate"><span class="pl-c"># litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py</span>
<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-v">MinimaxChatConfig</span>(<span class="pl-v">OpenAIGPTConfig</span>):
    <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>, <span class="pl-s1">model</span>, <span class="pl-s1">messages</span>, <span class="pl-s1">tools</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">None</span>):
        <span class="pl-c"># MiniMax supports cache_control - don't strip it</span>
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">messages</span>, <span class="pl-s1">tools</span>
    
    <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">get_supported_openai_params</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>, <span class="pl-s1">model</span>: <span class="pl-smi">str</span>) <span class="pl-c1">-></span> <span class="pl-smi">list</span>:
        <span class="pl-s1">base_params</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">super</span>().<span class="pl-c1">get_supported_openai_params</span>(<span class="pl-s1">model</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">model</span>)
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-s1">litellm</span>.<span class="pl-c1">supports_reasoning</span>(<span class="pl-s1">model</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">model</span>, <span class="pl-s1">custom_llm_provider</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">"minimax"</span>):
            <span class="pl-s1">base_params</span>.<span class="pl-c1">append</span>(<span class="pl-s">"thinking"</span>)
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">base_params</span> <span class="pl-c1">+</span> [<span class="pl-s">"reasoning_split"</span>]</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# litellm/llms/minimax/chat/transformation.py
class MinimaxChatConfig(OpenAIGPTConfig):
    def remove_cache_control_flag_from_messages_and_tools(self, model, messages, tools=None):
        # MiniMax supports cache_control - don't strip it
        return messages, tools
    
    def get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -> list:
        base_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)
        if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider="minimax"):
            base_params.append("thinking")
        return base_params + ["reasoning_split"]" tabindex="0" role="button">

class CacheControlSupportedModels(str, Enum):
    CLAUDE = "claude"
    GEMINI = "gemini"
    MINIMAX = "minimax"  # NEW
    GLM = "glm"          # NEW
    ZAI = "z-ai"         # NEW

def get_supported_openai_params(self, model: str) -> list:
    supported_params = super().get_supported_openai_params(model=model)
    if litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model, custom_llm_provider="openrouter") \
       or litellm.supports_reasoning(model=model):
        supported_params.append("reasoning_effort")
        supported_params.append("thinking")  # ADD THIS
    return list(dict.fromkeys(supported_params))" tabindex="0" role="button">
